name: Skai Omnichannel Advertising Platform API
what_it_does: Omnichannel advertising platform with REST API — managing and optimizing advertising across search (Google, Bing), social (Meta, TikTok, Pinterest), and retail media (Amazon, Walmart, Instacart, Target), with AI-powered budget optimization, incrementality testing, and cross-channel attribution for enterprise performance marketing.
use_cases: Managing search, social, and retail media campaigns from a unified API
Pulling cross-channel ad performance data for unified marketing analytics dashboards
Automating bid management and budget allocation across Google, Meta, and Amazon via Skai
Running incrementality experiments and media mix modeling via Skai Analytics
Integrating Skai campaign data with BI tools for CMO-level reporting
not_for: Small advertisers (<$100K/month spend) — Skai is for enterprise performance marketers
Creative production and management (use Smartly.io or Celtra for creative automation)
Influencer marketing and organic social (use Sprout Social or AspireIQ)
best_when: An enterprise performance marketing team or agency manages significant spend ($1M+/month) across search, social, and retail media simultaneously and needs unified campaign management, optimization, and attribution.
avoid_when: You're a mid-market company with spend under $100K/month, focus on a single channel, or primarily manage brand awareness campaigns rather than performance media.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped with advertiser and channel-level access. Webhook for campaign events and performance alerts. Google Ads, Meta, Amazon Ads, Walmart Connect, Instacart Ads API access via Skai abstraction. Agency multi-client access with hierarchical permissions. Scoped by channel and resource type.

pricing.paid_tiers: Percentage of managed ad spend or flat SaaS fee; contact sales
pricing.notes: Israeli company (Tel Aviv). Founded 2006 as Kenshoo, rebranded to Skai 2021. Raised $115M+ total. Backed by Sequoia, Arts Alliance, Tenaya Capital. 1,000+ enterprise clients including Hasbro, ADT, Kraft Heinz. Retail media platform expansion (Amazon, Walmart, Instacart) is key differentiator vs Google/Meta-only platforms. Cross-channel incrementality testing and MMM capabilities. Certified partner of Google, Meta, Amazon, Pinterest, TikTok.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per account; aligned with underlying platform limits

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for campaigns, ad groups, keywords, bids, and reporting across channels. OAuth2 auth. Good enterprise documentation. Underlying platform API limits (Google, Meta, Amazon) propagate through Skai. Retail media channels (Walmart, Instacart) require separate retail network agreements. Webhook for performance alerts.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Reporting reads fully idempotent. Campaign reads idempotent. Bid updates not idempotent — verify current bid before updating.
known_agent_gotchas: Multi-channel abstraction: underlying platform API changes (Google, Meta, Amazon) propagate
Retail media network access (Walmart, Instacart) requires separate retailer agreements
Israeli company — US and EU data residency available but Israeli team has system access
Enterprise pricing with annual commitment — validate ROI against managed spend volume
Incrementality testing and MMM require data science expertise to configure properly

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US, EU, IL data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. Ad performance data may include customer audience data — GDPR and CCPA compliance required. Israeli company — validate data transfer mechanisms for EU data under GDPR. Agency access requires careful advertiser data isolation.
